collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (19 total Queries, 19 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT SUM(upgrade_amount) as total, SUM(withdrawal_limit) as total_limit FROM upgrades WHERE member_id='718338'
SELECT date, up_date as invest, up_amount, income FROM roi WHERE member_id='718338' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT date, leftB, rightB, leftC as LCF, rightC as RCF, totalLeftB as totalLB, totalRightB as totalRB, matching, income FROM matching_income WHERE member_id='718338'
SELECT count(*) as total FROM members as m INNER JOIN upgrades as u ON u.member_id=m.member_id WHERE sponsor_id='718338'
SELECT SUM(income) as total FROM(SELECT DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), date)*daily AS income FROM level_income WHERE member_id='718338' AND level<=0 AND date>'2025-09-11 12:07:30')aa;

SELECT income_from as member_id, level, daily, date, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), date) as days, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), date)*daily as total_income FROM level_income WHERE member_id='718338' AND level<=0 AND date>'2025-09-11 12:07:30' ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM txn_details WHERE member_id='718338' AND type='withdrawal' AND (transfer_from is NULL or transfer_from='income')
